creative_brief: Split screen: left side shows a hand placing regenerative produce into a reusable bag at the Brookvale hub. Right side shows the same hand on a laptop, with a subtle FarmThru ownership page visible. Warm, natural light. No stock imagery.
primary_text:
You switched to regenerative groceries because the old system felt wrong.

So why is your money still backing that same system?

FarmThru is building a farm-direct grocery store with no middlemen or wholesalers. Real farms across NSW, a collect hub in Brookvale, and food that travels kilometres instead of thousands.

Now you can own a piece of what you already believe in.

No guarantees. But values and money finally pointing the same direction? That's rare.
headline: Your fridge changed. Your portfolio?
description: Own a piece of the farm-direct grocery store you'd actually shop at.
